description: Create a Python script named /home/ga/plot_event_map.py that generates a publication-quality map of the Noto Peninsula earthquake and the recording stations. The script must read the event epicenter and station locations from SeisComP and plot the stations (e.g., as triangles or dots) and the event epicenter (e.g., as a prominent star or circle). Save the generated map to /home/ga/noto_event_map.png and display the result.
